title: Revision of warehouse tariff and weighment charges at ICP attari dated 19.09.2013
description: Revision of warehouse tariff and weighment charges at ICP attari dated 19.09.2013
file_title: Revision of warehouse tariff and weighment charges at ICP attari dated 19.09.2013.pdf
text: HWW TO* F.No. O P / A t r / 0 4 / 2 0 1 2 / / / i / ^ _ / i / 3 s To Managing Director, Central Warehousing Corporation, New Delhi Land Ports Authority of India Ministry of Home Affairs Government of India 19 September, 2013 ^ Sub: Revision of warehouse tariff and weiqhment charges at ICP Attari. Sir, The facility of warehousing has been misused by trade at ICP, Attari resulting in unnecessary congestion. Port facilities are not to be used as warehouses. It has been therefore decided with the approval of Chairman, LPAI to revise the warehouse tariff and weighment charges at ICP Attari as detailed in Annexure-I. It has also been decided to implement the storage tariff for commodities to be stored in AC chambers at ICP Attari as detailed in Annexure-ll. 2. The revised charges and the tariff for the AC chambers as above should be made applicable from Tuesday the 1st October, 2013. 3. Trade had also expressed anguish at being charged for non-clearance of import cargo due to CWC/Service Provider. There is merit in this issue. Accordingly, relief has been proposed. 4 It is requested to inform all concerned accordingly. The revised rate & the tariff for the AC chambers should be displayed by Public Notice at least one week before, say by 21 September, 2013. End : as above oC (Anil Bamba) Member Copy forwarded to Shri Rameshwar, Manager, CWC, ICP Attari, Amritsar. Lok Nayak Bhawan, 1st Floor, Khan Market.
